summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of NextHeir AI-powered inheritance decision platform. All core features tested including landing page, authentication, scenario creation wizard, simulation engine, AI chat, and compare scenarios functionality.

minor_issues.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for scenario creation
minor_issues.impact: Minor - functionality works correctly, just incorrect status code

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section, how it works, and footer
User login flow with JWT authentication
Simulation engine runs and produces results
Results dashboard displays charts and fairness scoring
AI chat panel opens and responds to messages
Compare scenarios page loads and functions
All backend API endpoints (12/12 tests passed)
